title: Improved baseline: recurrent depth + LoRA + MTP
author: monroestephenson

data.description: 5 unique transformer layers are looped 2x to create 10 effective layers with weight sharing.
Input and output embeddings are tied.
Uses grouped-query style attention with fewer KV heads than attention heads.
Replaces the previous ReLU-squared MLP with a parameter-neutral SwiGLU variant.
Adds per-loop rank-16 LoRA adapters on attention Q/K/V/O projections for loop-specific specialization.
Each effective layer gets a learned scale vector so shared blocks can distinguish recurrence passes.
Adds multi-token prediction auxiliary heads during training.

novel_contributions: Depth recurrence with 5 unique transformer layers looped twice to achieve 10 effective layers
Wider 704-dimensional model enabled by parameter savings from weight sharing
Per-loop LoRA adapters on attention projections
EMA averaging with a fix to avoid serializing near-initial weights on short runs
Per-recurrence learned scale vectors for shared blocks
